name: Policy
description:
As a Hyperion sniper rifle, the Policy has a slow fire rate. Its accuracy starts poor, then improves the longer you stay aimed down sights, resetting when you stop aiming. This makes it weak for hip fire and quick-scoping, but very steady and accurate while scoped with minimal recoil.

With a Jakobs barrel, it trades some fire rate for increased damage and better accuracy.
notes:
In The Pre-Sequel, Policy variants often appear with Hyperion's newer materials and the same prefix set used in Borderlands 2.

A related Hyperion sniper, the Outlay, also exists in The Pre-Sequel and uses the older Hyperion style.

Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
